CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:30 am and concluding at 9:44 am.

Plaintiff 1620 Broadway U6 LLC is represented by Rebecca Coll, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant GJ Creative Equity Group not appearing.

The Court examins Plaintiff's counsel re: service of the 3rd amended complaint.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JEFFREY PHILLIPS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The Court Finds:
1. The 3rd amended complaint is the opperative pleading.
2. The Doe Defendants were dismissed as of July 17, 2024.
3. A Prima Facie showing has been made.

Plaintiff's counsel confirms that the Judgment will resolve the entire matter.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 1620 Broadway U6 LLC, and against Defendant GJ Creative Equity Group, as follows:

1. Damages: $638,913.68
2. Costs: $450.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $639,363.68

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend.
1st Cause of Action: Plaintiff fails to show that a fiduciary relationship existed between Vanguard and Plaintiff. Plaintiff fails to show that Vanguard was P's real estate broker or that an ostensible agency existed. The terms of the TIC Agreement clearly establish that Gallin and Jones, on behalf of GJ Creative, would perform non-real estate licensed activity in connection with the creation of the TIC Interests in exchange for a consulting fee. Moreover, none of the alleged wrongful conduct upon which the cause of action is predicated, (SAC 13), has anything to do with the listing, sale, leasing, exchange of or lending on real property, or any other conduct for which a real estate license is required. (Bus. & Prof. Code 10131; 10159.2.) While the TIC Agreement generally provides that Gallin and Jones were to "coordinate efforts to market and sell the TIC Interests," they were not contracted or authorized to list or sell the TIC Interests under the TIC Agreement. Plaintiff's allegations that Gallin and Jones were contracted to "solicit prospective buyers, list the TIC Interests for sale, and negotiate the purchase and sale of the TIC Interests," (SAC, 11), is not supported (if not completely undermined) by the terms of the agreement that expressly state that P was free to retain any agent or broker to market and sell the TIC interests once they were created. (Id. at Ex. B, 3(B).) Plaintiff's allegation that "[u]nder the TIC Agreement, [Plaintiff], Gallin, and Jones understood and agreed that Gallin and Jones would list, market, and sell the TIC Interests in their capacity as real estate agents under Vanguard's broker's license in exchange for payment of the sales commission" fails for the same reason. In fact, Vanguard is not referenced or named anywhere in the TIC Agreement. The Listing Agreement, which is neither signed by Vanguard, Gallin, or Jones, is dated almost one year after Plaintiff entered into contract with GJ Creative for its consulting and marketing services. Accordingly, Vanguard was not responsible for supervising activities of Gallin and Jones that were not activities of a real estate salesperson and that were performed on behalf of a different principal. (part 1 of 4). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
